rightToWork: British Citizen with full right to work in the UK.
personalStatement: Highly organised administrative professional with 5 years of experience in data entry, document management, and office operations. Proven track record of maintaining 99.9% accuracy in high-volume data processing environments. Seeking a challenging role where I can apply my attention to detail and efficiency to support business operations.

workExperience.summary: Lead data entry specialist handling high-volume financial records.
bullets: Process an average of 500 financial records daily with 99.9% accuracy rate.
Trained and mentored 3 junior data entry clerks, improving team efficiency by 25%.
Developed Excel macros that reduced manual data processing time by 40%.
Collaborated with IT department to implement new CRM system, migrating 50,000 customer records.

workExperience.summary: Provided comprehensive administrative support to a team of 12 solicitors.
bullets: Managed calendars, scheduled appointments, and coordinated meetings for senior partners.
Processed incoming correspondence and maintained filing systems for 200+ active cases.
Handled confidential client information in compliance with GDPR and professional standards.
Reduced document retrieval time by 60% through implementation of digital filing system.

highlights: Specialised in Operations Management and Information Systems.
Completed dissertation on workflow optimisation in SMEs.

achievements: Employee of the Month - Acme Corporation (March 2023)
